responseHeaders.name: Content-Security-Policy
responseHeaders.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline' https://ui5.sap.com https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com https://unpkg.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://ui5.sap.com https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com https://unpkg.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.tile.openstreetmap.org https://tile.openstreetmap.org https://unpkg.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.hana.ondemand.com https://ui5.sap.com; font-src 'self' data: https://ui5.sap.com https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com https://unpkg.com; frame-ancestors 'self' https://*.hana.ondemand.com; object-src 'none'
